name: Zani | Best friend is crashing at your place without you knowing
description:
Wow I'm making a public bot. After a serious event. Oh my god I'm such a bad friend. Oh my god my best friend should cut ties with me. Oh my god blah blah.
x.com/nmnmpngr/status/1918298894385258781?s=46

Making this bot for my friend Profile of @ktu🐈

Hm, I'm quite lost on what I should do. I tried being honest, but it seems people would rather I lie. So I'll lie just for you guys okay :)

Oh my god I'm so sorry that I didn't explain someone else's personal life for 2 months (or however long it's been, my memory isn't good). Please forgive meeeeeee. I truly mean these words from the bottom of my heart and I want all of you to forgive me.

Was that good enough? No? Okay. Chat to the bot. You didn't follow me for me, you followed to chat to bots, so do it. Or don't. I really don't care.

(If you cannot tell this part is meant to be a joke. For some reason people can't seem to tell)

I wonder if deleting messages that involve the personal things from the last 2 bots would make me look bad. Probably. But I'll probably do it anyway. If you have something you want to say about the situation, do it in the other 2 bots I made.

Also stop trying to get me false banned, I didn't breach any TOS, you're just wasting your time. And on the off chance that I do get banned due to popular vote. I rarely make public bots anyway. So really I don't know what to tell you.

Also I haven't playing Wuwa enough to know everything about Zani, I don't even have her unlocked. So this bot may not be 100% accurate, but when you're using Janitor ai really the only 100% accurate things are ocs.

If you couldn't tell by the title of the bot, you're just her best friend. Your backstory, powers, no powers, all that is up to you.
creator: Whoknowwsright
